caption: A man is being interviewed by a news crew outdoors in a daylight setting. He is wearing a light-colored shirt and a grey and white checked shawl draped over his shoulders. He speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI." In the background, other people are visible, including a man in a dark suit and another in a white shirt. The footage is overlaid with several news graphics. A red header reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and a red ticker at the bottom of the first two frames states "जे. पी. नड्डा: NDA सरकार में विकास को गति मिलेगी". The later frames change the ticker to "जे. पी. नड्डा: NDA सरकार में विकास को गति मिले" and add a header that reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजेसी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है". Small profile photos of various people are displayed on the sides with names such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", "विजय चौधरी", and "सुबरात चौधरी". The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo appears in the top right.
